name: youtube-subscriptions-fixer
description: Chrome/Brave extension for a cleaner YouTube subscriptions page.

scripts.build: tsc --project tsconfig.json && cp build/background.js build/content.js build/popup.js .
scripts.check: npm run build && jq . manifest.json >/dev/null && node --check background.js && node --check content.js && node --check popup.js
scripts.package: npm run check && mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/youtube-subscriptions-fixer-0.1.0.zip && zip -r dist/youtube-subscriptions-fixer-0.1.0.zip manifest.json background.js content.js popup.js content.css popup.css popup.html icons README.md PRIVACY.md
